notes: This tracker records manual verification progress beyond generated/source-extracted champion data.
Champion parity and source coverage are tracked separately in Simulation/champion_data_coverage_inventory.json.
Manual verification status should only be raised when non-trivial execution semantics were reviewed and documented in champion context notes.
